subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-03-01
subcodes.first_line: With what joy and transport they hastened toward the arena of martyrdom!... Bahá'u'lláh in one of his poems says: the mark of the chain
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment
